meaning: n.树液,体液,活力,坑道,笨人,傻子vt.使排出体液,使衰竭,挖坑道袭击,逐渐侵蚀vi.挖坑道
examples: The sap of this plant blisters the skin.
Maple syrup is made from sap extracted from the sugar maple tree.
The leaves, bark and sap are also common ingredients of local herbal remedies.
Morels first appear when the snow has just melted and the sap has run.
